postBody:
• Developed website in using HTML, CSS, Wix and word press platform.
  • Good experienced in CSS framework Bootstrap.
  • Created user friendly, standards compliant, cross browser HTML and CSS and JavaScript design.
  • Responsive website and modification templates.
  • Defined, maintained, implemented and enforced style guides and standards.
  • Skilled in cross-browser/cross-platform issues and web standards

Role and Responsibilities :

  • Requirement understanding, analysis, design, and testing. And working with team.
  • Convert web design PSD to html with Visual Studio Code.
  • Web design , testing ,and run application smoothly.
  • Responsive web designing and modification of template.
Excelled as High Performer as per the Infosys Standards. As part of generic training i have been trained in Python and DBMS and also been stream trained in Java
I have teaching experience in Database(SQL, PL/SQL, Trigger), Data Structure, Java
